ReleaseNotes: Interactive topography maps: PREOP, Simulated POSTOP and Ablation Profile are now shown as live maps. Move the mouse over any point to read its exact value and position.
Map overlays on demand: right-click a map to turn helpful guides on or off, including the maximum-ablation zone ring, reference rings and contour lines.

Redesigned session report: the report window now offers a clear Report view (interactive maps, key parameters and the selectable calculation protocol) and a PNG view of the printable page, with a tidier, easier-to-read information layout.
Export to PDF: save any session report as a PDF document with one click.
Reliable printing: Print Report now prints the same report as the PDF and works with any printer, without depending on which PDF application is installed on the computer.
Consistent reports from the database: reports opened from the patient database now match the original calculation report, including the interactive maps.
Ablation depth warning shows the live, interactive ablation map (with the maximum-ablation ring and label) so the result is easier to review before continuing.

Audit trail: the application now keeps a record of key actions — such as loading data, accepting an ablation plan, and opening, printing or exporting reports — together with the parameters used, and includes a built-in viewer with filtering and search to support traceability and review.
Engineering verification tool: a new Eye Map A/B check (engineering mode) confirms the interactive map matches the validated reference image and saves the result.
Refreshed interface: dialogs, buttons and fonts across the application have been updated for a cleaner, more consistent look.

Update improvements (carried forward): more reliable downloads and installation, stronger verification of update files, smoother handling of secured update packages, and an updated default online update source.
